% ICML 2025 Paper Template for Overleaf
% Auto-generated by Anonymous Research Pipeline
%
% Instructions:
% 1. Upload this folder to Overleaf
% 2. Ensure icml2025.sty is in the same directory
% 3. Compile with pdfLaTeX
%
\documentclass{article}

% ICML 2025 style - download from https://icml.cc/Conferences/2025/StyleAuthorInstructions
\usepackage{icml2025}

% Standard packages
\usepackage{microtype}
\usepackage{graphicx}
\usepackage{subfigure}
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage{hyperref}
\usepackage{amsmath}
\usepackage{amssymb}
\usepackage{algorithm}
\usepackage{algorithmic}

% For better table formatting
\usepackage{multirow}
\usepackage{makecell}

% Bibliography
\usepackage{natbib}

% Custom commands (optional)
\newcommand{\ours}{\textsc{MethodName}}  % Replace with your method name

% ============================================================================
% DOCUMENT METADATA
% ============================================================================

\icmltitlerunning{{PAPER_TITLE_SHORT}}

\begin{document}

\twocolumn[
\icmltitle{{PAPER_TITLE}}

% Author information - fill before submission
\icmlsetsymbol{equal}{*}

\begin{icmlauthorlist}
\icmlauthor{Anonymous Author}{inst1}
% \icmlauthor{Author Two}{inst1,inst2}
% \icmlauthor{Author Three}{inst2}
\end{icmlauthorlist}

\icmlaffiliation{inst1}{Institution Name, City, Country}
% \icmlaffiliation{inst2}{Second Institution, City, Country}

\icmlcorrespondingauthor{Anonymous Author}{anonymous@anonymous.org}

\icmlkeywords{Machine Learning, ICML}

\vskip 0.3in
]

% Print title but hide author info for review
\printAffiliationsAndNotice{}  % For camera-ready
% \printAffiliationsAndNotice{\icmlEqualContribution} % If equal contribution

% ============================================================================
% ABSTRACT
% ============================================================================

\begin{abstract}
\input{sections/abstract}
\end{abstract}

% ============================================================================
% MAIN CONTENT
% ============================================================================

\input{sections/introduction}
\input{sections/related_work}
\input{sections/methodology}
\input{sections/experiments}
\input{sections/results}
\input{sections/discussion}
\input{sections/conclusion}

% ============================================================================
% ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS (optional, for camera-ready)
% ============================================================================

% \section*{Acknowledgements}
% We thank...

% ============================================================================
% REFERENCES
% ============================================================================

\bibliography{references}
\bibliographystyle{icml2025}

% ============================================================================
% APPENDIX (optional)
% ============================================================================

\newpage
\appendix
\input{sections/appendix}

\end{document}
